name: get_host_info
title: Get Host Info
description: Return host metadata and supported infrastructure operations

name: stream_vm_console
title: Stream VM Console
description: Stream VM serial console output (lxc console). Direct TTY access for boot observability on this host.

name: send_console_input
title: Send Console Input
description: Send input data to an active console stream on this host.

data.description: Raw string data to send to the console PTY

name: resize_console
title: Resize Console
description: Resize an active console terminal on this host.

name: create_vm
title: Create VM
description: Launch a new Incus virtual machine on the host

image.description: Optional Incus image alias or remote image reference

disk.description: Optional root disk size such as 20GiB

name: provision_vm
title: Provision VM
description: Launch a new Incus virtual machine on the host

image.description: Optional Incus image alias or remote image reference

disk.description: Optional root disk size such as 20GiB

name: configure_k3s_load_balancer
title: Configure K3s HA load balancer
description: Provision or reuse a VM, install HAProxy, and forward the K3s API port to planned server nodes

image.description: Optional Incus image alias or remote image reference

disk.description: Optional root disk size such as 20GiB

name: configure_k3s_ha_servers
title: Configure K3s HA servers
description: Provision or reuse K3s server VMs and bootstrap/join them into the planned HA cluster topology

apiEndpoint.description: Cluster API endpoint exposed by the load balancer

tokenValue.description: Resolved K3s join token value supplied by the Bridge

tlsSans.description: TLS subject alternate names for the cluster API endpoint

image.description: Optional Incus image alias or remote image reference

disk.description: Optional root disk size such as 20GiB

name: start_vm
title: Start VM
description: Start a VM on the host

name: stop_vm
title: Stop VM
description: Stop a VM on the host

name: restart_vm
title: Restart VM
description: Force-stop and then start a VM on the host

name: install_k3s
title: Install K3s
description: Install K3s inside a VM and verify the service becomes active

name: uninstall_k3s
title: Uninstall K3s
description: Uninstall K3s inside a VM and verify the binary is removed

name: install_cluster_agent
title: Install Cluster Agent
description: Install and activate the Opute cluster agent service inside a VM

bridgeToken.description: Bridge bearer token for guest agent registration

bridgeUrl.description: Explicit bridge URL reachable from the guest VM

bridgePort.description: Bridge port to use when bridgeUrl is omitted and the host should auto-resolve the bridge address

name: restart_cluster_agent
title: Restart Cluster Agent
description: Restart the Opute cluster agent service inside a VM and verify it becomes active again

name: restart_cluster
title: Restart Cluster
description: Restart K3s inside a VM and verify the service becomes active again

name: restart_host_service
title: Restart Host Service
description: Restart a host-level service such as Incus and verify it becomes active

name: drain_cluster_nodes
title: Drain Cluster Nodes
description: Drain all schedulable K3s nodes in a multi-node cluster from inside the VM

name: delete_vm
title: Delete VM
description: Delete a VM forcefully from the host

name: configure_network
title: Configure Network
description: Attach a bridged NIC device to a VM so it joins a host network bridge (e.g. wlan0)

deviceName.description: Name of the NIC device inside the VM (default: eth1)

name: list_vm_network_devices
title: List VM Network Devices
description: List Incus network interface devices attached to a VM (from expanded config)

name: remove_vm_network_device
title: Remove VM Network Device
description: Remove a network interface device from a VM Incus configuration

deviceName.description: Name of the NIC device to remove (e.g. eth1)

name: ensure_docker
title: Ensure Docker daemon
description: Verify Docker Desktop daemon is running on Windows hosts (does not install Docker Desktop)

name: ensure_k3d
title: Ensure k3d
description: Install k3d CLI on Windows hosts when missing (requires Docker Desktop already installed)

name: install_provider_tools
title: Install Provider Tools
description: Validate provider readiness and switch the active infrastructure provider on this host (incus)

name: uninstall_provider_tools
title: Uninstall Provider Tools
description: Remove active provider association from the host after ensuring no VMs remain

name: register_kubernetes_cluster
title: Register Kubernetes Cluster
description: Register an externally-managed Kubernetes cluster (not provisioned by Opute). The cluster record is persisted in the bridge database and the kubeconfig is stored on the host.

kubeconfigPath.description: Path to an existing kubeconfig file on the host

name: list_kubernetes_clusters
title: List Kubernetes Clusters
description: List all managed Kubernetes clusters (both provisioned by Opute and externally registered).

source.description: Filter by cluster source: k3s-vm or external

name: exec_kubernetes_command
title: Execute Kubernetes Command
description: Execute a kubectl command against a registered cluster using its stored kubeconfig.

args.description: Arguments to pass to kubectl (each argument as a separate array element)

name: list_namespaces
title: List Namespaces
description: List Kubernetes namespaces inside a VM

name: list_services
title: List Services
description: List Kubernetes services inside a VM

name: list_pods
title: List Pods
description: List Kubernetes pods inside a VM

name: list_deployments
title: List Deployments
description: List Kubernetes deployments inside a VM

name: list_configmaps
title: List ConfigMaps
description: List Kubernetes ConfigMaps inside a VM

name: list_persistent_volume_claims
title: List Persistent Volume Claims
description: List Kubernetes persistent volume claims inside a VM

name: list_ingress_classes
title: List Ingress Classes
description: List Kubernetes ingress classes inside a VM

name: list_kubernetes_secrets
title: List Kubernetes Secrets
description: List Kubernetes secrets inside a VM

name: list_storage_classes
title: List Storage Classes
description: List Kubernetes StorageClasses inside a VM

name: list_certificate_issuers
title: List Certificate Issuers
description: List cert-manager Issuers and ClusterIssuers inside a VM

name: list_service_ports
title: List Service Ports
description: List exposed ports for a Kubernetes Service inside a VM

name: inspect_workload
title: Inspect Workload
description: Inspect a Kubernetes Deployment and return fields useful for workload forms

name: list_configmap_keys
title: List ConfigMap Keys
description: List data keys in a Kubernetes ConfigMap inside a VM

name: list_secret_keys
title: List Secret Keys
description: List data keys in a Kubernetes Secret inside a VM

name: get_k8s_resource
title: Get Kubernetes Resource
description: Fetch a Kubernetes resource from a VM-backed cluster as YAML.

kind.description: Kubernetes resource kind, such as Deployment, Service, Pod, ConfigMap, or PersistentVolumeClaim

name: get_k8s_resource_status
title: Get Kubernetes Resource Status
description: Fetch a normalized readiness status for a Kubernetes resource in a VM-backed cluster.

resourceKind.description: Kubernetes resource kind, such as Deployment, Service, Pod, ConfigMap, or PersistentVolumeClaim

name: list_service_domain_bindings
title: List Service Domain Bindings
description: List service-owned hostname bindings stored in the Bridge for a managed cluster.

name: get_service_domain_binding
title: Get Service Domain Binding
description: Fetch a single service-owned hostname binding by ID.

name: upsert_service_domain_binding
title: Upsert Service Domain Binding
description: Create or update a service-owned hostname binding.

name: delete_service_domain_binding
title: Delete Service Domain Binding
description: Remove a service-owned hostname binding from the Bridge.

name: sync_service_domain_binding
title: Sync Service Domain Binding
description: Manually trigger reconciliation for a service-owned hostname binding.

targetIp.description: Optional explicit IP to sync to.

name: list_postgresql_databases
title: List PostgreSQL Databases
description: List CloudNativePG PostgreSQL database records in Bridge inventory. Default returns non-deleted rows on existing managed clusters. Set includeDeleted: true for tombstoned/removed history (optional clusterId).

includeDeleted.description: Include status:deleted rows (default: true when clusterId is set, otherwise false)

name: get_postgresql_database
title: Get PostgreSQL Database
description: Fetch a PostgreSQL database record by ID.

name: create_postgresql_database
title: Create PostgreSQL Database
description: Provision a CloudNativePG-backed PostgreSQL database from a minimal name and size contract.

name: resize_postgresql_database
title: Resize PostgreSQL Database
description: Request a new size profile for an existing PostgreSQL database.

name: delete_postgresql_database
title: Delete PostgreSQL Database
description: Delete a PostgreSQL database managed by CloudNativePG.

name: list_service_storages
title: List Service Storages
description: List persistent storage declarations for a managed service.

name: get_service_storage
title: Get Service Storage
description: Fetch a persistent storage declaration by ID.

name: create_service_storage
title: Create Service Storage
description: Provision storage for a managed service and queue the storage workload through the bridge.

name: update_service_storage
title: Update Service Storage
description: Update a managed service storage declaration.

name: backup_service_storage
title: Backup Service Storage
description: Queue a backup operation for managed service storage.

name: restore_service_storage
title: Restore Service Storage
description: Queue a restore operation for managed service storage.

name: delete_service_storage
title: Delete Service Storage
description: Delete managed service storage and queue the storage teardown workload.

name: list_agents
title: List Agents
description: Retrieve a consolidated list of all agents (host and cluster) connected to the bridge server.

name: create_host_onboarding_session
title: Create Host Onboarding Session
description: Create a short-lived Bridge-backed install command for onboarding a remote Linux host.

hostName.description: Friendly host name to show in Opute

publicBridgeUrl.description: Bridge URL reachable from the remote host

expiresInSeconds.description: Token lifetime in seconds, between 300 and 86400

name: get_host_onboarding_session
title: Get Host Onboarding Session
description: Fetch live status for a Bridge host onboarding session.

name: diagnose_bridge
title: Diagnose Bridge
description: Probes the local bridge control plane (port 9092) and check its health

name: recover_bridge
title: Recover Bridge
description: Attempts to recover the local bridge control plane by restarting the service
